scenarios.name: Right-click on the menubar icon shows a context menu

steps.text: the app is running
the user right-clicks the menubar icon
a context menu appears containing "Settings…"
the context menu contains "Quit jarizz"

scenarios.name: Selecting Settings from the context menu opens the Settings window

steps.text: the app is running
the user right-clicks the menubar icon
the user selects "Settings…" from the context menu
the Settings window is visible

scenarios.name: Global hotkey defaults to LeftShift+RightCommand+] on first launch

steps.text: the app is launching for the first time with no saved settings
the app launches
the global hotkey is "LeftShift+RightCommand+]"

scenarios.name: Panel size defaults to 50 percent on first launch

steps.text: the app is launching for the first time with no saved settings
the app launches
the panel size is "50" percent of the screen frame

scenarios.name: Changing the global hotkey applies immediately

steps.text: the app is running
the user sets the global hotkey to "<hotkey>"
the global hotkey is "<hotkey>"

scenarios.name: Changed global hotkey persists after app restart

steps.text: the app is running
the global hotkey has been set to "<hotkey>"
the app is restarted
the global hotkey is "<hotkey>"

scenarios.name: Changing the panel size applies immediately

steps.text: the app is running
the user sets the panel size to "<percent>" percent
the panel size is "<percent>" percent of the screen frame

scenarios.name: A size preview overlay appears while the slider is adjusted

steps.text: the Settings window is open on the General tab
the user moves the panel size slider to "<percent>" percent
a transparent overlay is shown at "<percent>" percent of the current screen

scenarios.name: Panel size is constrained between 20 and 90 percent

steps.text: the app is running
the user sets the panel size to "<percent>" percent
the panel size is "<percent>" percent of the screen frame

scenarios.name: Changed panel size persists after app restart

steps.text: the app is running
the panel size has been set to "<percent>" percent
the app is restarted
the panel size is "<percent>" percent of the screen frame
